title: Fabric essentials
description: A modpack with the fabric essentials
body:
1. Welcome to fabric essentials! This is a modpack of mods i prefer for fabric.
So its minecraft fabric down to its essentials.
2. What is fabric essentials?
3. Its a fabric modpack for performance and non-gameplay affecting mods.
ALL BUGS GO TO DISCORD USER rubrub_46357
Note that the first 2 versions of this modpack crash when you extend a piston or place sand.
